review_title: An Excellent All-in-One SEO Tool and the Most Affordable Quality Rank Tracker on the Market Today.
description: Incredible experience so far. I had become aware of Brandoverflow pretty early on in the beta testing phase in early 2020. The team is EXTREMELY responsive and fast at implementing new features or fixing bugs. They do listen to the market and their user suggestion. So far so good, I am delighted.
author: Armand M.
pros: What I love the most is the Rank Tracker. It's one of the most accurate Rank Tracker I know and can easily compete with the best ones of the likes of Semrush, Mangools, SE Ranking, Serpstat, or RankActive. Also, it's very affordable without cutting corners on data accuracy which is the most important thing for me. The second thing I like the most is the other SEO modules for Keyword Research, Local SEO, SERP lookups, and Backlink Monitoring.
cons: Not having the possibility to extract all the keywords URL ranks for is lacking so far. I truly hope this will come in the future.

review_title: Best tool for CPC and SEO marketing
description: My overall experience with Brand Overflow is really amazing. It provides accurate data and functionality that is needed for my business.
author: hm S.
pros: Brand Overflow is fantastic for CPC Marketing and SEO. I mostly like its keyword data segmentations like Questions, Phrases, and Shopping. I also love its similarity percentage too. CPC and search volume of Brand Overflow are pretty accurate. Its Backlink checker, Keyword monitor and analyze section are awesome. It also gives very effective data for SEO Audit. It is easy to get the optimized and issues with a clean interface. Their support is very helpful.
cons: Everything about Brand Overflow is really excellent. But there should be some more features to make this tool more influential. From my point of view, Brand Overflow needs to add website loading speed and Mobile Optimized status option. The founder of this software is really customer oriented. Hope they will consider my recommendation.

review_title: Rank Tracker Doesn't Work
author: Tareq M.
pros: The tool is an all-in-one solution for SEOs but doesn't really stand out in any part compared to the prominent SEO tools.
cons: The rank is tracker is the only portion that I used from the tool. It was buggy from the start but I thought they will solve the issues as it's a new tool. But more than a year of using it, I think the tool is left alone to run as is without any bug fix or development. I reached out to the support multiple times with their bugs, but the tool is still so much buggy. And recently, it doesn't show any usable result in rank tracker which made me subscribe to another rank tracker tool that works.

review_title: Brand Overflow have a lot of potential in the future
description: Using a few times a week for checking rank and some keywords, for me is a good investment and I hope to develop more advanced features in the next period.
author: Ciomîrtan A.
pros: The software has a new dashboard and a new version that move very fast, with low time of waiting for task you make in dashboard. Projects Section - Good info about all the domains you have set up in the app. Keywords - Maybe one of the most important features of the software, have a good reporting for keywords in my country. Backlinks - BrandOverflow is a good alternative for a backlink profile, listing all the backlinks you have on your website. Audit - I like that I can scan only 1 page for audit and don't need to crawl all pages from a website.
cons: Because it is a fast-growing app and tech, few things need to improve or add to the software. Projects Section - I was looking to have some important alerts after the box of the software (like most 3 or 5 things that need urgently to do, or rank tracking for loosing or gaining important positions). Keywords - Sometimes the outputted keywords have not some relevance with keyword searched. Backlinks - Hope to implement the option to see all the backlinks from a domain, not all the backlinks in a list, if I have 500 backlinks from 1 domain and 20 from other important domains, don't need to scroll hundreds of backlinks to check what I need. Audit - Is not the best audit tool for SEO On-page, but does the job for most important things from a website.

review_title: A Decent Rank Tracker with Some Awesome Extra Feature
description: My overall experience is quite good so far. This tool is bringing new features day by day. Which is also a plus.
author: Samiul H.
pros: The tool gives accurate tracking data, great for keyword research and site audit. Moreover, this is an affordable rank tracker in the market and they are improving day by day with great customer support.
cons: The dashboard is a little confusing. User interface and experience should be improved. Server load is quite high, so, sometimes loading time increases.

review_title: Brand Overflow is a great ALL IN ONE SEO APPLICATION option with Keyword Research
description: Good platform for the price, competitive features and constant updates
author: Daniel M.
pros: Brand Overflow is an up and coming rank tracker, SEO analysis and keyword research tool. The pricing is below ahrefs and has started offering more features and DAILY UPDATES on tracking. For me the most important is the Keyword research tools. They were recently expanded to offer: Keyword Tool Keyword Explorer Keyword Generator Question Generator Long Tail Keywords Youtube Keywords Bulk Search Volume Global Search Volume Keyword Insights LSI Keywords Save money, Get Data - the sky is the limit!
cons: Wish you could have a single keyword input and get outputs in all the keyword modules = HUGE TIME SAVER

review_title: Rank tracking , Key word research and Seo tool
description: We use it on daily basis for keyword research, rank tracking and its question explorer.
author: Veeral L.
pros: Swis army knife for you Seo needs. Very good tool if you can not afford semrush and ahrefs but are looking for a good seo tool
cons: Link tracking . But for the price I can not complain.

review_title: Being an early adopter of Brand Overflow has been a great decision for me!
description: Brand Overflow has been a good experience for me overall. The BO team has been hard at work improving their tool set over the past couple of months. Based on user feedback, they overhauled the entire program. Following their recent social media activities, I am pretty impressed with the dedication they have shown to the tool. I think Brand Overflow will only continue to improve since a dedicated, hardworking team works behind the scenes.
author: Saidur R.
pros: Rank tracking, backlink analysis and keyword research modules.
cons: SEO audit module. This tool can be improved further, in my opinion. However, it is advertised as a basic auditing tool, so that makes sense.

review_title: Simplicity Matters
description: Overview of a project, and displaying for client especially the site audit is really good. I always chased for complexity and details data point, but that is we as technical user. End users or clients are preferring Brand Overflow easy understand dashboard and projects structure better.
author: Ryan C.
pros: The simplicity, and the presentation of the data. The data needed are all there, but able to simplify the process and display it in simple beautiful and easily viewable format is actually a hard thing to get right, but Brand Overflow are on track.
cons: The keywords rank tracking at the project, i do which we can set custom period. Like a Monthly, or daily, rather than as of now seem to be 7 days period.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: 2022 revamp to one of the best SEO tool!
author: Vy M.
pros: What I like about Brand Overflow is the nice looking frontend of the UX and the generous keyword limit compare to other similar tools. They did alot of update since the first version, so it nice to see the team is working hard and improving the product. It is really on par with other competitor like SEranking. I'm looking forward what the future hold and can consider it one of my best purchase of the year.
cons: It abit hard to remove the keywords, hope their is an easier solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Value SEO Software
author: Henry H.
pros: Great data quality with powerful agency features
cons: More indepth features for Google search ads would be great.

review_title: Set Yourself A Part From The Competition All Day Long!
description: I satisfied and they have a great community and following.
author: Ram S.
pros: Once you get in there it takes you about 10 minutes to discover some really great tools. And then you can start building your tracking and projects.
cons: The options not released yet, but to limit keywords I want to see and maybe more customizable KW reports on topics etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best All-in-one SEO tool for the price.
description: I use Brand Overflow daily with few other SEO tools, my experience has been absolutely great. Like I mentioned Rank trackers are very expensive, Brand Overflow helps me cut my costs without sacrificing any quality.
author: Sarang G.
pros: The revamped Rank tracker is absolutely gold, the rank tracking is accurate. My favourite is the backlink tracker as I no longer have to be subscribed all the time to AHREFS for tracking things.
cons: I think the UI can be improved and more search engines like Bing, Alexa & Yandex plus mobile SEO need to be prioritised. Also, it would be a great plus if Content related SEO features can be included.

review_title: Robust and comprehensive AIO SEO Tool
author: Naz H.
pros: I've been using Brand Overflow to manage my on-page, off-page and technical SEO for the last six months, and I can't be happier. The UI is beautiful and intuitive to use. I love the constant updates, evolution and user-friendly interface. The tools work very well on any browser, and it's noob-friendly, which is excellent for my team members who are not from the SEO department. I'm excited about the future agency tools and the recent competitor analysis features. I can't wait to see how much better Brand Overflow becomes.
cons: Currently, the backlink database and crawler are a bit limited. It's up to 10k crawls and doesn't show when the data link was last seen/found. I understand this will be developed, so I can live with this for now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A+ Keyword/ SEO tool
description: I use all the tools on a daily basis and it helps my business grow.
author: John H.
pros: There are so many great features. Most companies just have one of the 10 tools they have.
cons: Im not sure yet I really like the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good tool to get you started in the world of SEO
description: It helps me to understand and learn a little more about this complicated world that is SEO.
author: Miguel G.
pros: The Brand overflow Project is a newly upgraded dashboard and a new version of the Project that is blazingly fast and provides a wonderful ability to manage your SEO projects. Is a great tool in back linking, listing all the backlinks you have on your website. Brand over flow Backlinks features has an excellent feature to sort backlinks. Quickly scan all the pages of a website. A very good audit function that allows you to see the authority of your website.
cons: There are some tools that are missing, including competitive keywords comparison, finding organic web traffic compared with most competitors, and keyword analysis. I hope they will continue adding outstanding features to the soft wear and see how the team improved the tool in the next months.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: User-friendly seo tool
author: Junior M.
pros: Brandoverflow lifetime deal has allowed me to remove a number of tools from my arsenal of seo tools.It has made tracking my SEO efforts easier to measure, but also to spy on my competitors.So I immediately closed this deal and am very much looking forward to the further development of this great tool
cons: It would be nice to be able to switch between clients (dashboard) more easily and add keywords to websites that do not have any traffic yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fast and Easy
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It has the key things you need to rank your page. The system is fast too. Keyword Tool, Backlinks, Audit appear in less than a minute. - Keyword Tool includes Tree & Grouping tab to have a visual aid on what phrases I can use for my blog. - Backlinks not only include New ones but also "Lost" ones. - Audit is nice cool too to addon to see my overall website health score and the recommendation I need to fix improve my SEO score.
cons: Keyword Tool can consume quite fast the limit available. Best if have options to restrict the numbers of limit you want to utilize or the option to switch off some of the categories. E.g. I might not be interested in "Shopping" category for this particular keyword research.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rank Tracking is Very Accurate!
author: Baikuntha A.
pros: Rank Tracking is the most useful feature of Brand Overflow. For my local projects, it is very accurate and Fast too.
cons: No Cons so far but i feel the development is slowed down at the moment.

review_title: Ease of use
description: Great development! This is what I love the most, it's always developing! Better user interface, cleaner structure, easier to use etc. The support is also really good.
author: Vincent D.
pros: It's easy to use. When you've setup your domain and start adding keywords it's all being shown in a very tidy and structured manner. It's easy to find what you're looking for and it helps you fine tune your SEO.
cons: The initial domain setup. If you're a total newbie, you'll encounter some obstacles. In case you are, contact support and they will help you out.

review_title: Brand overflow is great to check competitor keywords
description: I have been looking for a good tool to help me with competitor research. I came across brandoverflow and it has been a handy tool that solves it. It is so easy to use, and provides accurate data for each keyword ranking.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This tool was so easy to use to find the keyword for SEO, especially from the competitor websites. I checked the ranking in google. It's easy and accurate,
cons: The only thing that I would say is that the local language has some mistakes for space. It's not a huge issue, but it does make things difficult when you are trying to read the content in another language
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product and growing strong
author: Ongun Ç.
pros: I love products when they bring all in one solution. Brandoverflow also one of them. They give us a lot of helpfull data under one tool.
cons: No serious issue for me. I alway looking to positive side. What the tool giving to me or my business.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feature Rich SEO Tool that helps in Lead Generation!
description: I’ve been following Brand Overflow for 2 years, despite the many problems its founders are actively developing the product. Now he has come up with a new approach and is actively pushing more updates. I am happy with the product and their approach for the tool. I would recommend this tool if you are looking for Feature Rich tool with a low budget.
author: Aristotle M.
pros: For projects, we can enable Website Audits and keyword suggestions for our website so that we will always have the most updated audit and suggestions for our site. The best part is we can share our project reports with our clients. This feature is most helpful for agencies, they can share the reports with their clients. With their keyword research tool, we can see the search volume, intent-based keyword suggestions, and their PPC difficulty and search volume. you can see the tree diagrams and grouping of keywords based on intent. with the help of competitor keywords, we can do a competitor keyword analysis and see their SEO performance and steal the keywords that are low competitive. It also shows the competitor domains of the given domain by us. Brand Overflow backlinks tool quality is good. It shows the total links, Do-follow and no-follow links and displays all the domains that referred to you in recent time and total time. you can also see the new and lost keywords in the total time. The audit tool is good to see all the errors on our site and fix them. We can also use it as a lead agent to share SEO Audits with our leads. They are working to automate Audit generation using zapier and other tools, which is a big plus. If you are an agency, you can set up Agency branding and share reports with your domain.
cons: It has PPC difficulty for keywords but I believe it needs SEO difficulty too. I think the audits can have CTA that links to our services which helps us a lot as well. Currently, we can’t automate the audit generation, but I heard that they are working on it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great SEO tool for small businesses
author: Alban T.
pros: With Brand Overflow, users have access to various SEO tools, including in-depth competitor analysis, keyword research, and backlink checker. The SEO tool also features URL optimization, social media monitoring, and domain suggestion. Brand Overflow features an intuitive dashboard that allows users to track their SEO performance. The SEO tool features color-coded alerts, which alert users on issues that need attention. Users can use the tool to monitor their search engine activities. The user can track keyword ranking, monitor various SEO metrics, and calculate the estimated monthly search volume of keywords. Users can also track backlink strength of their websites, and check the link profile for various URLs.
cons: It has been neglected in the past few months with few updates. But they were working on it in the background.

review_title: An All-in-One SEO Tool That Grows With You
description: As the one-person marketing department for a nonprofit organization, I am always on the hunt for tools that can make my job easier while also fitting our budget. Brand Overflow has been an incredible find that checks all the boxes. This is a tool that I came across in my side-gig work, and am so glad for the discovery! I cannot give it enough stars!
author: Jessica Kay M.
pros: Brand Overflow provides all the core SEO functionality I need to optimize our website and content, track rankings, monitor backlinks, and more. But unlike some other enterprise-level SEO tools, Brand Overflow is extremely affordable and user-friendly. I was able to get up and running quickly without a technical background, but the platform also has enough depth that I have been able to take my SEO knowledge to the next level over time. I can follow along with the Skislope strategy method and other tutorials that use more expensive tools!
cons: It's hard to say. Brand Overflow has improved so much over the past year and a half that I've been using it. It used to be slow and a little glitchy, but my recent experience is that those issues have been resolved. No cons as of the last time I used it (this week).
